stemHtml: What must the commander of an aircraft do with regards to the emergency exits?

options.a: Make sure that at least 1 able bodied person knows where the emergency exits are.
options.b: Make sure that all passengers know where the emergency exits are.
options.c: Make sure that half the passengers know the location of the exits.
options.d: Nothing, because it is up to the passengers to find out where the exits are located.
